# GitHub Copilot — Room TBA

Read **[AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md)** and **[docs/agent-contract.md](docs/agent-contract.md)**.

- Smallest correct diff; no drive-by refactors
- Ponytail ladder: reuse → stdlib → platform → new code last
- Tests in same PR as feature when issue-linked
- Feature PRs target `staging`, not `main`
